case_title: MISSION AREA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION,A CAL CORP vs. ORTIZ, JOSE DE JESUS et al

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-28-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-28-1994 CONTINUED FROM OCT-28-1994 TO NOV-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-28-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-28-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
